text.title: AI Feature Progressive Rollout Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for ai-feature-progressive-rollout.

decision-tree.root-question: Are observability pillars + eval gate + flag platform in place?

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — instrument all four pillars before rollout
BLOCK — fix eval delta before any ring
BLOCK or BIG-BANG — pick path with explicit risk note
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
